name: vibesearch
description: VibeSearch: the complete SEO toolkit for Claude Code. Fixes, not findings, across Google, Maps, and AI search.

plugins.name: vibesearch
plugins.description: Complete SEO toolkit that ships fixes, not findings. Ten commands cover the whole job: audits with paste-ready fixes, keyword maps, AI-citable content, internal link insertion lists, competitor teardowns, local SEO execution, Search Console analysis with zero OAuth, capacity-sized strategy, and drift monitoring. Zero dependencies, built-in memory.
